subcodes.first_line: O thou who art athirst for the divine flame of guidance, a ray of celestial light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق به نار هدایت الهیه پرتوی از انوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry, @Manifestation of God as sun, @transcendence; unknowability of God
